title: Viners Sicily 16 Piece Cutlery Set | Stainless Steel Flatware, Mirror Finish, Dishwasher Safe & Rust Resistant, Everyday Dining & Entertaining, British Heritage Brand

features: COMPLETE 16 PIECE SET | Includes 4 table knives, 4 table forks, 4 dessert spoons and 4 teaspoons – ideal for family dining and guests.
ELEGANT DESIGN | Features tear drop shaped spoons and slender curved handles, polished to a mirror finish for a touch of luxury.
QUALITY STAINLESS STEEL | Made from fine quality 18.0 stainless steel, rust resistant and durable for long-lasting performance.
EASY TO MAINTAIN | Dishwasher safe for convenience, from Viners – a trusted British brand with over 110 years of heritage.

VINERS ELEGANCE | Viners has existed for over 110 years and has become a much-loved British brand and household name, steeped in heritage. We pride ourselves on delivering excellence - elegant, robust cookware made from the best materials.
